message:
fix(vendored): fix 5 bugs across ssh, mux, and term crates

- ssh/config.rs: fix typo "userknownkostsfile" → "userknownhostsfile"
  in should_expand_tokens() — SSH token expansion was silently skipped
  for known_hosts paths containing %h, %d, etc.

- mux/localpane.rs: fix unsafe cast of tcgetpgrp() return value (-1 on
  error) to u32 — negative pid_t became 0xFFFFFFFF, causing bogus
  process lookups. Now clamps to 0 on error.

- mux/termwiztermtab.rs: guard against division-by-zero when TerminalSize
  has cols=0 or rows=0 in xpixel/ypixel calculation (2 call sites).

- term/image.rs: add early bail for zero-dimension images and zero-size
  draw regions — prevents divide-by-zero panic in image cell placement.

- term/iterm.rs: add early return for zero-dimension images in iTerm2
  image protocol handler — prevents f32::INFINITY aspect ratio.

Validated: 299 mux + 261 term tests pass via rch. All crates compile clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -476,8 +476,8 @@ pub fn allocate(
             screen_size: ScreenSize {
                 cols: size.cols as usize,
                 rows: size.rows as usize,
-                xpixel: (size.pixel_width / size.cols) as usize,
-                ypixel: (size.pixel_height / size.rows) as usize,
+                xpixel: if size.cols > 0 { (size.pixel_width / size.cols) as usize } else { 0 },
+                ypixel: if size.rows > 0 { (size.pixel_height / size.rows) as usize } else { 0 },
             },
         },
         input_rx,
@@ -525,8 +525,8 @@ pub async fn run<
             screen_size: ScreenSize {
                 cols: size.cols as usize,
                 rows: size.rows as usize,
-                xpixel: (size.pixel_width / size.cols) as usize,
-                ypixel: (size.pixel_height / size.rows) as usize,
+                xpixel: if size.cols > 0 { (size.pixel_width / size.cols) as usize } else { 0 },
+                ypixel: if size.rows > 0 { (size.pixel_height / size.rows) as usize } else { 0 },
             },
         },
         input_rx,
